Discovery: FDA PDUFA target date July 7, 2026 for atacicept BLA in IgA Nephropathy (Priority Review); Phase 3 ORIGIN showed 46% proteinuria reduction and 42% UPCR reduction vs placebo — first B-cell modulator targeting both BAFF and APRIL for IgAN, a high-unmet-need indication.
value_picks.analyst_take: PDUFA July 7 (25 days) with Priority Review + BTD; 144% analyst upside; probability-weighted FV $75; binary risk — max 1-2% portfolio sizing only

avoid_picks.analyst_take: Accelerating broadband subscriber losses (4 consecutive quarters, rate worsening each quarter) + D/E 459% + SI 44.3% = structural decline value trap; cheap P/E is a mirage
Analyst consensus target $101 is 18% BELOW current $123.84; bookings growing only 6% while subscribers +21% = monetization breakdown; AI disruption of language learning is structural; SI 21.8%
